explanation: Original command line as a baseline for comparison.
Inserted quotes around the config file path to test parsing behavior.
Replaced 'cloudflared' with 'cloudflared.exe' and used short flag '-config' instead of '--config'.
Used equals sign (=) to assign the config path directly after the flag.
Added an additional flag '--connector-id' to simulate a more complex command line.
Inserted quotes around the connector ID to test parsing behavior.
Added a trailing '--' to test if the command line parser stops processing flags.
Added a verbose flag '-v' to test if optional flags are ignored by the detection rule.
Added a debug logging flag to test if additional flags are ignored by the detection rule.
